# Web cache: openclaw gateway agent skills memory 核心组件

> 时间: 2026-03-08 06:53


## 1. 
- 来源: duckduckgo

Remote macOS nodes (Linux gateway ). Skills watcher (auto-refresh). Token impact ( skills list). OpenClaw uses AgentSkills-compatible skill folders to teach the agent how to use tools. Each skill is a directory containing a SKILL .md with YAML frontmatter and instructions. Doctor/ Memory : query gateway -side default- agent memory embedding readiness during openclaw doctor (instead of inferring from generic gateway health), and warn when the gateway memory probe is unavailable or not ready while
